<!-- Generated by agents-reverse-engineer v1.2.17 -->

# builtin

Six builtin tool implementations for Attractor agent system. Structs implement `Tool` trait for atomic file operations, search, shell execution via `ExecutionEnvironment` abstractions.

## Contents

- [mod.rs](./mod.rs) — Barrel re-export of `EditFileTool`, `GlobTool`, `GrepTool`, `ReadFileTool`, `ShellTool`, `WriteFileTool`.
- [edit_file.rs](./edit_file.rs) — `EditFileTool` exact-string replacement. Validates `old_string` match count, supports `replace_all` flag for global replacement.
- [glob.rs](./glob.rs) — `GlobTool` glob file search via `env.glob_files()`. Truncates to `MAX_OUTPUT_CHARS = 20_000` with `TruncationMode::Tail`.
- [grep.rs](./grep.rs) — `GrepTool` regex search via `env.grep()`. Truncates to `MAX_OUTPUT_CHARS = 20_000` with `TruncationMode::Tail`.
- [read_file.rs](./read_file.rs) — `ReadFileTool` line-numbered read with pagination (`offset`, `limit` default 2000). Format `"{:>width$} | {}"`, truncates to `MAX_OUTPUT_CHARS = 50_000` via `TruncationMode::HeadTail`.
- [shell.rs](./shell.rs) — `ShellTool` command execution via `env.exec_command()`. Format `"Exit code: {}\nStdout:\n{}\nStderr:\n{}"`, truncates to `MAX_OUTPUT_CHARS = 30_000` via `TruncationMode::HeadTail`, `timeout_ms` default 10000.
- [write_file.rs](./write_file.rs) — `WriteFileTool` file write with auto parent directory creation.

## API Surface

Exports via [mod.rs](./mod.rs):
- `EditFileTool` — Exact-string file editor
- `GlobTool` — Glob pattern matcher
- `GrepTool` — Regex file searcher
- `ReadFileTool` — Paginated file reader with line numbers
- `ShellTool` — Shell command executor
- `WriteFileTool` — File writer with mkdir

## Patterns

**Tool Trait Implementation.** All structs implement `Tool` via `#[async_trait]`. `definition()` returns `ToolDefinition` with JSON schema. `execute()` takes `serde_json::Value` arguments and `&dyn ExecutionEnvironment`, returns `attractor_types::Result<String>`.

**Barrel Pattern.** [mod.rs](./mod.rs) collects implementations for upstream `crate::builtin::*` imports.

**Environment Abstraction.** Tools use `ExecutionEnvironment` methods (`read_file`, `write_file`, `glob_files`, `grep`, `exec_command`, `working_directory`) not direct filesystem access.

## Behavioral Contracts

**Truncation Limits.**
- `MAX_OUTPUT_CHARS = 20_000`: [glob.rs](./glob.rs), [grep.rs](./grep.rs) — `TruncationMode::Tail`
- `MAX_OUTPUT_CHARS = 30_000`: [shell.rs](./shell.rs) — `TruncationMode::HeadTail`
- `MAX_OUTPUT_CHARS = 50_000`: [read_file.rs](./read_file.rs) — `TruncationMode::HeadTail`

**Output Formats.**
- Read file: `"{:>width$} | {}"` (right-aligned line number, pipe separator)
- Shell: `"Exit code: {}\nStdout:\n{}\nStderr:\n{}"`

**Error Patterns.**
Missing required field: `"{field} is required"` (e.g., `"file_path is required"`, `"pattern is required"`, `"command is required"`)

`EditFileTool` specific:
- Zero matches: `"old_string not found in {}"`
- Multiple matches without `replace_all`: `"old_string found {count} times in {path} (at lines: {occurrences:?}). Use replace_all=true to replace all occurrences."`

**Success Formats.**
- Edit: `"Successfully replaced {replacements} occurrence(s) in {}"`
- Write: `"Successfully wrote {} bytes to {}"`

**Schema Defaults.**
- `read_file` `limit`: 2000 lines
- `read_file` `offset`: 1-based externally, converted via `saturating_sub(1)`
- `shell` `timeout_ms`: 10000
